title: Orlando Heat Wave
lead: Orlando is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.49. This event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Orlando is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 14.7 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 37%, and the wind speed is 11.3 km/h, which is not providing much relief. 
 The city's infrastructure and residents are under significant stress due to this prolonged heat wave.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
